summary: Backend testing complete for User Onboarding Workflow feature. All 14 tests pass (100%). Signup creates user with status='pending', requested_role stored, and role='user' until admin approves. All pending users management APIs working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: SMS notification is MOCKED - logs message if Twilio not configured, which is expected behavior as noted in requirements
seed_data_creation: None - test users created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All pending users backend APIs are working. Signup creates users with status='pending', role='user', and stores requested_role. Super admin can approve/reject pending users via admin endpoints. Stats API includes pending_users count for dashboard.

features_tested.get_pending_users_list: PASS - /api/admin/pending-users returns list sorted by created_at desc
features_tested.approve_pending_user: PASS - /api/admin/pending-users/{id}/approve sets status='active' and configures user
features_tested.organizations_dropdown: PASS - /api/admin/organizations returns list for signup form
features_tested.pending_users_include_org_name: PASS - response includes organization_name from lookup

mocked_apis.SMS notification: MOCKED - Twilio SMS notification to super admin logs message when Twilio not configured (expected behavior)
